repoURL.description: The URL of the remote Git repository containing the pull request.

prNumber.description: The number of the pull request to merge.

provider.description: The name of the Git provider to use. Currently 'azure', 'bitbucket', 'gitea', 'github', and 'gitlab' are supported. Kargo will try to infer the provider if it is not explicitly specified.

mergeMethod.description: The merge strategy to use. If not specified, the provider's default will be used.

insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: Skip TLS verification when interacting with the Git provider. Default is false.

deleteBranchAfterMerge.description: If true, deletes the source branch after merging the PR. Default is false.

waitForChecks.description: If true, waits for all required status checks to pass before merging. Default is true.

maxWaitSeconds.description: Maximum number of seconds to wait for checks to pass. Default is 600 (10 minutes).
